Billing Jun 1-21: spend $402.12, Avg CPC $1.16, Avg CPL $4.73. 12mo: Ads 980 (57%)/Organic 741/Total 1,721. Bonus budget remaining not shown on dashboard. toast.source: Toast group Daily Performance Summary email ('The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group - Sunday, June 21'), arrived Mon Jun 22 ~6:23 AM PT. Figures from the email body (All Locations = single location 229 W Montecito). NOTE: this same-morning group email does NOT carry same-day-last-week / 4-wk comparison columns, labor $, void $, or discount $ -- those arrive with the detailed '229 West Montecito Street' summary ~1 day later.
toast.note: Toast Sun Jun 21 (group daily summary): Net $7,308.29 / Gross $7,542.65 / 290 guests / 147 orders / Labor 18.9% / 8 void items / discount 3.1%. Avg/guest $25.20, Avg/order $49.72. Card payments 119, 1 remaining open order, auto-clocked-out: Jorge Aldana Aquirre. Order type: 1 takeout ($32.00), 0 delivery, 1 dine-in ($0.00). laborCost ($1,381.27) and discounts ($233.82) are DERIVED from the percentages; void $, same-day-last-week & 4-wk comparison columns are not in the same-morning group email -- they land with the detailed 229 W Montecito summary ~tomorrow. Prior freshest (Toast Sat Jun 20) moved to toastLastKnown.
